findings.description: The description for `BasicInsertionStrategy` was changed from the source text. Source says "InsertionValidationStrategy実装クラス" but knowledge file says "InsertionStrategy実装クラス".
findings.source_evidence: Source: `BasicInsertionStrategy  典型的なINSERT処理を提供するInsertionValidationStrategy実装クラス。` — Knowledge file: `典型的なINSERT処理を提供する\`InsertionStrategy\`実装クラス。`

findings.description: `DbAccessSupport` is a class explicitly required as the first argument of `BulkValidationResult#importWith` and is mentioned in the section content, but is absent from the s7 hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source: "第１引数にはDbAccessSupportクラスのインスタンスを指定する。通常ActionクラスはDbAccessSupportクラスを継承しているので、自分自身の参照(this参照)を使用すれば良い。"
